narrative:
Hubbard City 1B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 596 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.6 percentage points.
